positive_prompt: lunar space station, vast moon panorama; silver regolith, cratered horizon, Earthrise view; futuristic domes + modules, glowing panels, antennas; cold light, cinematic sci-fi atmosphere; photoreal, high-contrast
negative_prompt: blur/low-res/artifacts, oversaturation, cartoon/3d-render look, duplicates, floating objects
verification_prompt: księżyc style, lunar space station, vast moon panorama, sharp, photoreal, no blur, no oversaturation, no duplicates, no floating objects
